# Pull Request

## Summary

- Describe the change.

## Required Checks

- [ ] CI passes: Repository policy, Markdown quality, Actionlint, Dependency review
- [ ] Secret Scan passes: Gitleaks
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, `.env` files, private keys, or customer data added
- [ ] Dependency changes are intentional and reviewed
- [ ] Release-impacting changes are covered by the release checklist

## Review Evidence

- [ ] Code owner review requested
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes called out explicitly
- [ ] Deployment or rollback notes included when behavior changes
